drafts.substack:
REGIME: Risk-on | Confirmed
CONFIDENCE: Medium (56/100)
RISK TILT: pro-risk
STABILITY: Fragile

Snapshot — Jun 17, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,520.30   z +1.02
  10Y Yield:      4.428%  z +0.17
  WTI Oil:        76.38   z -2.51

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,520 is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. 10Y yield at 4.43% is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from yields. Oil at $76 is running well below its 63-session range — oil haven't been this stretched in months. Confidence sits at 56/100 — enough for a directional lean but not a high-conviction call.

INVALIDATION
• 10Y above 4.58% + SPX loses 7,445
• Oil above $85

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.
